nodes.name: Webhook: Receive Task
nodes.notes: Manager Agent calls this endpoint with a task. First call (no payment) returns 402. Second call (with X-Payment-Hash) executes the pipeline.

nodes.name: Has Payment Header?
nodes.notes: Branches on whether the caller provided an X-Payment-Hash header. No header = x402 probe. Header present = payment verification flow.

nodes.name: Respond: 402 Payment Required

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "x402": true,
  "agentId": "research",
  "amount": "{{ $json.body.price || '1' }}",
  "asset": "XLM",
  "network": "Stellar Testnet",
  "destination": "{{ $json.body.agentPublicKey }}",
  "description": "Payment required to unlock Research Agent",
  "instructions": "Submit a Stellar testnet payment to the destination address, then retry this request with the X-Payment-Hash header set to your transaction hash.",
  "webhookUrl": "{{ $json.headers.host }}/webhook/research-agent"
}

nodes.notes: Standard x402 response. Tells the Manager exactly how much to pay, to which wallet, and on which network. The Manager uses this to construct and sign a Stellar transaction.

nodes.name: Verify Payment on Stellar Horizon
nodes.notes: Queries Stellar Horizon to fetch all operations for the submitted transaction hash. Retries up to 5 times with 2s delay to allow Horizon indexing. Passes the full response forward for validation.

nodes.name: Payment Valid?
nodes.notes: Validates the Horizon response: checks that a 'payment' operation exists with the correct destination and sufficient XLM amount. Returns { valid: true/false } to drive the next branch.

nodes.name: Is Payment Confirmed?
nodes.notes: Routes to either a 402 error response (payment invalid) or the full research pipeline (payment confirmed).

nodes.name: Respond: 402 Invalid Payment
nodes.notes: Payment hash was provided but verification failed — wrong destination, insufficient amount, or Horizon couldn't find the transaction.

nodes.name: SerpAPI: Web Search
nodes.notes: Performs a live Google search via SerpAPI for the task submitted by the Manager Agent. Returns organic results, knowledge graph, and answer box. Replace $env.SERPAPI_KEY with your n8n credential.

nodes.name: Extract & Format Search Results
nodes.notes: Extracts and concatenates the answer box, knowledge graph, and top 6 organic results into a clean research context string for the Groq AI analysis step.

nodes.name: Groq: AI Research Analysis
nodes.notes: Sends the task + live search context to Groq (Llama 3.3 70B). The system prompt instructs the model that it has been paid on Stellar and its output feeds downstream agents. Temperature 0.3 keeps responses factual.

nodes.name: Build Final Response
nodes.notes: Assembles the final response payload: the AI research result plus a rich metadata object (tx hash, explorer URL, token count, pipeline label) so the Manager can display full provenance in the Activity Feed.

nodes.name: Respond: 200 OK + Research Result
nodes.notes: Returns the full research result plus provenance metadata. The Manager Agent reads $json.result for the task output and $json.meta.txHash for Stellar Ledger display.
